title: thelypteris middle-earthica
side_effects: Thelypteris middle-earthica can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds like thelypterin and glycosides. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma attacks. In severe cases, improper use of thelypteris middle-earthica may lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even seizures. Additionally, the plant's toxic properties can interact with other medications, exacerbating pre-existing health conditions and increasing the risk of adverse reactions.
